allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\(''''dependencies'''',{}\), **d.get\(''''devDependencies'''',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if any\(x in k for x in [''''markdown'''',''''remark'''',''''rehype'''',''''typography'''',''''tailwind'''',''''prose'''']\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''package.json''\)\); deps={**d.get\(''dependencies'',{}\),**d.get\(''devDependencies'',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if ''tailwind'' in k or ''postcss'' in k]")
Bash(node -e "const tw = require\(''tailwindcss''\); console.log\(tw.version || ''no version''\); const pkg = require\(''./node_modules/tailwindcss/package.json''\); console.log\(pkg.version\)")
